source_refs: Project evidence: Engineering + Design Experts connector breakout image role
business_goal: Create a breakout-ready connector image that bridges the CTA band and footer with a credible engineering subject
page_role: Homepage Engineering + Design Experts connector breakout image
visual_message: A real engineering or field-operations subject with clear silhouette, cutout potential, and industrial credibility
iteration_hypothesis: A subject-led industrial image with strong silhouette control will work better as a breakout connector than a wide environmental scene

technical_signals.aperture: f/2.8 to f/4 with subject clarity
technical_signals.light_source: controlled industrial ambient light or soft directional light
technical_signals.time_of_day: neutral indoor or shaded exterior light
technical_signals.motion_rule: still or nearly still subject; no dramatic action pose

spatial_positioning: primary subject fills most of the frame height
background remains secondary and easy to separate visually
subject silhouette stays clean for later breakout treatment
equipment can support context without overpowering the figure
visual_standard: corporate engineering photography with strong subject isolation
color_restriction: restrained industrial neutrals with controlled accent colors from PPE or equipment only; avoid neon and hyper-saturation
material_notes: real fabric, PPE, and equipment materials
clean metal or industrial background surfaces
no plastic AI skin or sheen
subject edges remain believable and cutout-friendly

composition_rule.hero_safe_area: not required; subject silhouette and breakout potential come first
composition_rule.focal_structure: one dominant subject with minimal background noise
composition_rule.camera: commercial portrait or subject-led industrial photography

lighting_rule.contrast: controlled and punchy enough for silhouette separation
lighting_rule.surface_behavior: real subject textures and believable material response
